title: Hyperliquid Perps on Mobile with Nest
summary_title: Mobile perps trading on Hyperliquid: faster than telegram bots, fully decentralized
summary_description: Nest Wallet launches Hyperliquid L1 perps on mobile with native key custody, MEV protection, and zero speed compromise versus centralized bots.

key_moments.label: Team background: ex-BitGo custodians building for mobile
Gap in market: no solid mobile perps experience exists yet
Soft-launched Hyperliquid perps hours ago; official Monday
Speed comparison: mobile app faster than Solana telegram bots
Roadmap: spot trading and staking coming within weeks
Hyperliquid EVM support planned for two weeks after L1 launch
Points system live now; potential airdrop if adoption scales
One-button bridge from Solana to Hyperliquid in development

pull_quote: You get the security profile of metamask and phantom but why do we have to settle for subpar features? Let's just build something we'd actually use.
